use_codes.desc: METHOD OF TREATING SCHIZOPHRENIA BY ADMINISTERING THE ATYPICAL ANTIPSYCHOTIC OLANZAPINE AND SAMIDORPHAN, WITH REDUCED ANTIPSYCHOTIC INDUCED WEIGHT GAIN
METHOD OF TREATING BIPOLAR DISORDER BY ADMINISTERING THE ATYPICAL ANTIPSYCHOTIC OLANZAPINE AND SAMIDORPHAN, WITH REDUCED ANTIPSYCHOTIC INDUCED WEIGHT GAIN
METHOD OF TREATING SCHIZOPHRENIA BY ADMINISTERING THE ATYPICAL ANTIPSYCHOTIC OLANZAPINE AND SAMIDORPHAN, WITH REDUCTION OF THE ADVERSE METABOLIC PROFILE
METHOD OF TREATING BIPOLAR DISORDER BY ADMINISTERING THE ATYPICAL ANTIPSYCHOTIC OLANZAPINE AND SAMIDORPHAN, WITH REDUCTION OF THE ADVERSE METABOLIC PROFILE

METHOD OF TREATING BIPOLAR DISORDER BY ADMINISTERING THE ATYPICAL ANTIPSYCHOTIC OLANZAPINE AND SAMIDORPHAN
METHOD OF TREATING SCHIZOPHRENIA IN A PATIENT WHO HAS PREVIOUSLY EXPERIENCED SIGNIFICANT WEIGHT GAIN INDUCED BY OLANZAPINE ALONE BY ADMINISTERING A COMPOSITION COMPRISING OLANZAPINE AND SAMIDORPHAN
METHOD OF TREATING BIPOLAR DISORDER BY ADMINISTERING A BILAYER TABLET COMPRISING OLANZAPINE AND SAMIDORPHAN
METHOD OF TREATING SCHIZOPHRENIA BY ADMINISTERING A BILAYER TABLET COMPRISING OLANZAPINE AND SAMIDORPHAN

indications.text:
LYBALVI is indicated for the treatment of:
 Schizophrenia in adults
 Bipolar I disorder in adults
o Acute treatment of manic or mixed episodes as monotherapy and as adjunct to
lithium or valproate
o Maintenance monotherapy treatment
